shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc 'test -d node_modules/next/dist/docs && find node_modules/next/dist/docs -maxdepth 2 -type f | head -80 || true'

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' package.json && printf '\\n--- app/lib/auth.ts ---\\n' && sed -n '1,240p' app/lib/auth.ts && printf '\\n--- app/page.tsx ---\\n' && sed -n '1,240p' app/page.tsx && printf '\\n--- app/layout.tsx ---\\n' && sed -n '1,240p' app/layout.tsx"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,220p' next.config.ts && printf '\\n--- tsconfig ---\\n' && sed -n '1,220p' tsconfig.json && printf '\\n--- all files ---\\n' && rg --files app"

/bin/bash -lc "curl -sS -D - http://localhost:3000/admin -o /tmp/admin-response.html && printf '\\n--- body markers ---\\n' && rg -o '<title>["'^<]*|403|permission to view|Return home'"' /tmp/admin-response.html | head -20"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,180p' tsconfig.json && printf '\\n--- files ---\\n' && rg --files app | sort"
